description: Composition Green round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves and graphic print on the front Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash or hand wash separately in mild detergent Do not bleach Do not wring dry Dry in shade Medium iron, but do not iron on print The print on the front takes away the cookies from this jealous 21 top. The floral print with the portrait of a woman is artistically defined, while the simple cut and neckline flatters your silhouette with ease. Look your best by pairing this with slim Fit denims and heeled pumps. Product is a size M on a model of height 5'7” and chest 33”
